arts.ttl: What do Man Utd and Spurs need in their final Europa League match?
arts.sum: The stakes in the final Europa League matches on Thursday at 20:00 GMT are identical to that of the UEFA Champions League. Sitting in fourth place with 15 points, Ruben Amorim ’s side have a two-point gap above the playoff places, meaning a draw at Romanian team FCSB could be enough to secure a top-eight spot, depending on results elsewhere.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to battle Manchester United in race for Dortmund goalkeeper Gregor Kobel
arts.sum: The Swiss shot-stopper could be in demand this summer, with both Premier League clubs keen to strength between the sticks amid growing pressure on Robert Sanchez and Andre Onana

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's messages from David Beckham and Wayne Rooney as Man Utd icon gives up
arts.sum: Multiple Manchester United legends have supposedly reached out to Marcus Rashford over the course of his Old Trafford decline - but it appears olive branches may be running out
